title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 434.090 - Action to be commenced in three months
text:
434.090.  Action to be commenced in three months. — Any action for money or property brought under this chapter shall be commenced within three months from the time the right of action accrued, and not afterward.
(RSMo 1939 § 3400) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3013; 1919 § 5750; 1909 § 6631
